name: Starweb
author: Christian Freeling (2017) / AGP port
description: Christian Freeling's drawless connection-scoring game on a 217-cell 'web' board (a hexagon-of-hexes of side 7 with a triangular bump on each side) that has 18 special STAR cells. Players alternately place a stone or pass; the game ends on two successive passes. Each of your connected groups scores the triangular value 1+2+...+n of the n stars it contains (1, 3, 6, 10, ...). Most points wins; an equal score goes to the second player.
